channel.title: Cloud Native on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud Native on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Cloud Computing (3): Cloud-Native and Container Technologies
item.description: The shift from monolithic applications to cloud-native architectures is one of the most consequential changes in software engineering this decade. The headline — containers and Kubernetes — is well known. The interesting story is why this stack won, what each layer actually does, and where the seams are that determine whether your platform feels effortless or feels like a maze.
